All services are dependent on available funds. 1536 W 12th Street Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-3:30pm, Friday 10am-4pm Email (541) 997-2816 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SIUSLAW OUTREACH SERVICES COMMUNITY ASSISTANCE SERVICES
